title: gentiana aquatica subsp. laeviuscula
intro: Gentiana aquatica subsp. laeviuscula, also known as the water gentian, is a subspecies of plant within the gentian family that grows in aquatic environments. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of gentiana aquatica subsp. laeviuscula include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the roots and leaves to create a tea or tincture that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
